name: GitHub IdP MFA Correlation Workbook
description: Workbook template for correlating GitHub audit-log events with IdP MFA events.

content.json: {"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"GitHubAuditLogsV2_CL | where Action in ('org.login','saml_authentication','oauth_authorization') | extend User=tostring(coalesce(User,Actor,ActorLogin)) | project TimeGenerated, User, Action, Repo=tostring(Repo), Org=tostring(Org), IP=tostring(IPAddress)","size":0,"title":"GitHub login-like events","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}

{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"GitHubAuditLogsV2_CL | where Action in ('org.login','saml_authentication','oauth_authorization') | extend User=tostring(coalesce(User,Actor,ActorLogin)) | join kind=leftouter ( EntraSignInLogs | where ResultType == 0 | extend User=tostring(coalesce(UserPrincipalName,Identity,UserDisplayName)) | project SignInTime=TimeGenerated, User, AuthenticationRequirement, AuthenticationMethodsUsed, ConditionalAccessStatus ) on User | extend DeltaMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, SignInTime) | where isnotempty(SignInTime) and abs(DeltaMinutes) <= 15 | project TimeGenerated, SignInTime, DeltaMinutes, User, Action, AuthenticationRequirement, AuthenticationMethodsUsed, ConditionalAccessStatus","size":0,"title":"Matched GitHub events with IdP MFA","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}

{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"EntraSignInLogs | where ResultType == 0 | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)","size":0,"title":"IdP MFA success trend","visualization":"linechart","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}

{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"GitHubAuditLogsV2_CL | where Action has_any ('token','credential','oauth','saml') | summarize Count=count() by Action | order by Count desc","size":0,"title":"GitHub auth activity by action","visualization":"barchart","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}
